task_completion.description: Create the new image style with the correct name
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Drupal admin page (like 'Add image style' or the Image Styles list) showing the Image style name 'Product Main (600x600)' and/or the machine name 'product_main_600'.

task_completion.description: Add the Scale and crop effect to the image style
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Scale and crop' effect being selected from the 'Select a new effect' dropdown, or listed in the effects table for the 'Product Main (600x600)' image style.

task_completion.description: Configure the effect dimensions to 600x600 pixels
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the effect configuration form or the effects summary table showing both Width and Height set to exactly '600'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Default product variation type display settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Drupal admin page titled 'Manage display' specifically for the 'Default' product variation type (usually under Commerce -> Configuration -> Product variation types -> Default -> Manage display).

task_completion.description: Configure the Product image field to use the new image style
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Manage display' page, look for the settings summary (often revealed by clicking the gear icon) for the Product image field showing the Image style set to 'Product Main (600x600)', followed by a saved confirmation message.

integrity.description: The agent used the Drupal web interface to configure the settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Drupal admin UI. There should be no terminal windows using 'drush' or direct database commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application rather than a text editor or mock
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the standard Drupal Commerce administrative theme (e.g., Claro or Seven) with functional menus, tabs, and form elements.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspector/Elements panel) should not be open and actively modifying the DOM text to display 'Product Main (600x600)' or '600x600'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The image style must have the exact label 'Product Main (600x600)' and machine name 'product_main_600'. The effect used must be 'Scale and crop' (internal name: image_scale_and_crop) with both width and height set to exactly 600 pixels. The display settings must be configured specifically on the 'Default' product variation type (machine name: default).
